messages.message: Is your equipment designed for commercial studio use?
Yes. All equipment is designed for commercial studio use and daily high-frequency training.

Hi! Thanks for reaching out To make sure I point you to the right Pilates Reformer, could you tell me a bit about your plan? Is this for a studio, gym, or resale business? Roughly how many units are you considering? Which country will the machines be delivered to?

Sure For commercial studio reformers, pricing depends on the model: • Standard models: around $360-800 per unit • Premium studio models: around $900–1200 per unit • Reformer with tower (3-in-1): around $1000–1600 per unit
Since you’re looking at commercial use, I can recommend the most suitable setup for you. Quick question — are you planning a new studio or adding to an existing one?
I found them cheaper 我发现它们更便宜
